overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval village street with half-timbered houses, then entering a dimly lit tavern and exploring its ground floor and upper levels. The clip transitions from bright natural outdoor lighting to warm fire-lit interior environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with half-timbered houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cobblestone village street between tall half-timbered buildings

notable_agents.action: villager in dark cloak walking alongside the protagonist

entered.detail: traditional medieval half-timbered building with exposed wooden beams and plaster infill
tall half-timbered structure with external wooden staircase attached to the facade
uneven cobblestone path with patches of grass growing between stones
steep wooden staircase leading up the side of the right building
stone archway entrance to the tavern with heavy wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow medieval village street lined with traditional half-timbered houses. The cobblestone path is uneven with patches of grass, and villagers walk in opposing directions. The camera follows the character as they approach a stone building entrance at the end of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with stone fireplace and wooden furnishings

events.description: character enters the tavern from the bright outdoor street into the dimly lit fire-lit interior
character turns to explore the right side of the tavern near the fireplace and tables

agents.ego_description: entering the tavern and walking around the main hall, observing the interior layout and patrons

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at wooden table near candlelight

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire, cooking pot, and stacked wood
dark wooden plank flooring worn with age and use
tall wooden shelves holding jars, bottles, and supplies
thick exposed wooden ceiling beams supporting the upper floor
heavy wooden door through which the character entered, now behind them

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit medieval tavern from the bright street outside. The interior features a large stone fireplace with a burning fire, wooden shelves with supplies, and exposed ceiling beams. A patron sits at a table to the right. The character explores the ground floor, moving past wooden furniture toward a staircase at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor corridor and stairwell of the tavern

events.description: character ascends the wooden staircase from the ground floor to the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep wooden stairs and exploring the narrow upper floor corridors

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with rough hewn steps and wooden railings leading upward
dark wooden plank walls of the upper floor corridor
small rectangular windows letting in slivers of exterior light
doorways leading to side rooms off the main corridor

segments.scene_description: The character climbs a steep wooden staircase to the tavern's upper floor, leaving the ground floor fireplace behind. The upper level features narrow corridors with dark wooden walls, small windows, and doorways leading to side rooms. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with the character exploring the enclosed wooden structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open medieval village street into the dim, enclosed depths of a multi-level tavern. It begins by trailing the character along an uneven cobblestone path lined with half-timbered houses and passing villagers before approaching a stone building entrance. As the character steps inside, the scene shifts from natural daylight to a warm, fire-lit interior featuring a large stone fireplace, wooden shelves, and rustic furniture. The camera then follows the character across the ground floor toward a steep wooden staircase, leaving the glow of the hearth behind. Finally, the movement ascends to the upper floor, where the environment transforms into a series of narrow, atmospheric corridors with dark wooden walls and small windows.
